negative_controls.description: Keep the original path-only cache implementation.
negative_controls.expected_failure: The changed file returns stale feature flags.

negative_controls.description: Use one global cached value for every settings path.
negative_controls.expected_failure: The second file is contaminated by the first file's flags.

negative_controls.description: Bypass the cache but always return the first parsed value.
negative_controls.expected_failure: Content-change invalidation and per-file isolation checks fail.
